Uses of PCSCReader in emiratesid.ae.readersmgt
 

Methods in emiratesid.ae.readersmgt that return PCSCReader
 PCSCReader[] ReaderManagement.getReaders()
          Return all PCSC readers, a prior call to discoverReaders is mandatory
 PCSCReader ReaderManagement.selectIDCardReader()
          Retrieves the first PCSCReader object of a UAE smart card from the discovered list of readers
 PCSCReader ReaderManagement.selectReaderByATR(char[] ATR)
          Retrieves the first PCSCReader object from the discovered list of readers that matches a specific ATR
 PCSCReader ReaderManagement.selectReaderByName(java.lang.String readerName)
          Retrieves the first PCSCReader object from the discovered list of readers that matches a specific name
 PCSCReader ReaderManagement.selectSAM()
          Retrieves the first PCSCReader object of a SAM card from the discovered list of readers
 PCSCReader ReaderManagement.selectTestIDCardReader()
          Retrieves the first PCSCReader object of a test card from the discovered list of readers
 

Methods in emiratesid.ae.readersmgt with parameters of type PCSCReader
 void ReaderManagement.setReaders(PCSCReader[] readers)
           
 

Constructors in emiratesid.ae.readersmgt with parameters of type PCSCReader
CardInfo(PCSCReader reader)
          Initializes the CardInfo object with PCSC reader data
